ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays home matches */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "team_founded" TEXT /* Date when the team was founded */,
  "team_nicknames" TEXT /* Nicknames of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the match was played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated */,
  "league_position" INTEGER /* League position at the end of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goal_statistics" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal statistics entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the match was played */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded */,
  "goal_diff" INTEGER /* Goal difference */,
  "expected_goals_for" REAL /* Expected goals scored */,
  "expected_goals_against" REAL /* Expected goals conceded */,
  "expected_goal_diff" REAL /* Expected goal difference */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed */,
  "passes_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of passes attempted */,
  "possesion" REAL /* Average possession */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goal_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance_records" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (league, cup, friendly) */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player (goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  "player_age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistics entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the player played */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed by the player */,
  "passes_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of passes attempted by the player */,
  "distance_covered" REAL /* Total distance covered by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (league, cup, friendly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
